summary: Completed comprehensive testing of authentication features for Thryve Invoice Generator. All 9 features tested successfully - login, dashboard, user menu, change password, logout, user management, user creation, and protected routes.
passed_tests: Login with default admin credentials (admin@thryve.in / admin123)
Dashboard loads after successful login with correct stats
User menu dropdown shows user name and role correctly
Change Password dialog opens with all input fields
Change Password validation - empty fields, password mismatch, short password, wrong current password
Logout functionality redirects to login page with success toast
User Management page accessible only for admins (hidden for staff)
Creating new user from admin account works correctly
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Staff user cannot see User Management link in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
JWT token handling is secure with proper expiration
Password hashing uses bcrypt which is secure
Role-based permissions are correctly enforced on both frontend and backend
seed_data_creation: Created test staff user (test_staff_user@thryve.in) and test viewer user during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication feature is fully implemented and tested. Default admin user is created on startup. User Management page is admin-only. JWT tokens are stored in localStorage. All protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated.
